title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Continue, Cancel
scenario: Guest user can navigate from Support via hamburger menu to Login dialog with Cancel and Continue buttons, where Cancel returns to Support App section with Later/Login modal still present
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a new user and select "Guest" during onboarding.
2. From the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
4. In the Support section, tap the "App" button.
6. Observe the login dialog that appears.
8. Tap "Cancel" (upper-left corner) to return to the Poly Support App section.
expected: Step 6: A login dialog with Cancel and Continue buttons is displayed. Step 7: Tapping Continue opens the login page. Step 8: Tapping Cancel (upper-left corner) returns the user to the Poly Support App section with the Later/Login modal still present.
